title: ⚡ Multi-URL Workspace is Live! 🚀
message: We have engineered a powerful new batch environment! You can now compile, arrange, and stitch multiple websites simultaneously into a flawless continuous master document with full premium plan control.
points: 🔗 Multi-URL Workspace Builder: Group multiple websites or custom raw HTML codes side-by-side into a unified project list. (Free Tier: Max 3 items | PRO Tier: UNLIMITED sites!)
📜 Continuous Canvas Rendering: Combines all configured workspace snapshots sequentially into a single continuous scrolling output, completely eliminating broken page margins and padding gaps.
🤚 Drag-and-Drop Sequence Arranger: Seamlessly reorder the conversion hierarchy of your web links on the fly using responsive row dragging gestures.
🗂️ Smart Vault Batch Storage: Saves your entire active workspace list as a structured entry in your history database so you can re-open the entire batch with one tap.
👑 Premium Freedom Unlock: Upgrading to PRO permanently removes the 3-site workspace restriction, unlocks unlimited daily workspace operations, and wipes out all processing interstitial ads entirely.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest Web to PDF tools and features.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly when you open the app.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood rendering tweaks for even faster HTML and URL to PDF conversions.
